messages.content:
Classify each personal-finance transaction into EXACTLY ONE category from this closed list: [SALARY, INTEREST, INVESTMENT_INCOME, REFUND, OTHER_INCOME, DINING, GROCERIES, TRANSPORT, HOUSING, UTILITIES, SHOPPING, HEALTHCARE, ENTERTAINMENT, TRAVEL, EDUCATION, INSURANCE, FEES, OTHER_EXPENSE]. Respond with ONLY the raw JSON array — Do NOT wrap it in markdown or code fences and do not add prose. Item i must be {"category": "<one of the list>", "confidence": <0-100 integer>, "reason": "<short>"} for transaction i.

Transactions:
0. direction=IN description="Monthly salary deposit ACME PTE LTD"
1. direction=OUT description="NTUC FairPrice groceries"

response.stream_text: [{"category": "SALARY", "confidence": 100, "reason": "Monthly salary deposit from employer"}, {"category": "GROCERIES", "confidence": 100, "reason": "Purchase at a supermarket"}]
